component:
org.nebulaengine.Nebula CC0-1.0 MIT Nebula Engine Multi-platform 2D and 3D game engine with a feature-rich editor ​org.nebulaengine.Nebula.desktop
Nebula is an advanced, feature-packed, multi-platform 2D and 3D game engine. It provides a huge set of common tools, so you can just focus on making your game without reinventing the wheel.
Nebula is completely free and open source under the very permissive MIT license. No strings attached, no royalties, nothing. Your game is yours, down to the last line of engine code.
3D project loaded in the Nebula Engine editor https://download.tuxfamily.org/nebulaengine/media/screenshots/editor_3d_fracteed-720p.jpg
https://github.com/cruglet/nebula https://github.com/nebulaengine/nebula/issues https://docs.nebulaengine.org/en/latest/about/faq.html https://docs.nebulaengine.org https://github.com/cruglet/nebula/donate https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/nebula-engine/nebula The Nebula Engine Community akien_at_nebulaengine_dot_org
